title: What Auditors Check in Cleaning Validation
alt: Checklist of areas inspectors examine in a cleaning validation audit

items.label: Worst-case rationale
items.desc: Documented product grouping and bracketing, revisited for new products

items.label: Health-based limits
items.desc: PDE-derived carry-over limits, not arbitrary dose or ppm rules

items.label: Sampling & recovery
items.desc: Justified swab/rinse points and validated recovery factors

items.label: Validated methods
items.desc: TOC, HPLC or assays with sensitivity below the limit

items.label: Data integrity
items.desc: ALCOA+ records, audit trails and contemporaneous signatures

items.label: Ongoing verification
items.desc: Hold-time validation, trending and change-control triggers
